name: dev-digest-harness-marketplace
description: Reusable engineering-harness plugins (skills, agents) extracted from an internal engineering project.

plugins.name: engineering-paved-path
plugins.description: Shared engineering best-practice skills: React, Next.js, Fastify, testing, security, architecture, and full-stack foundations.

plugins.name: research-tools
plugins.description: Read-only research agent that gathers and fact-checks information from the codebase or the public web.

plugins.name: architecture-review
plugins.description: Generalized read-only architecture reviewer that audits diffs against project-supplied structural rules.

plugins.name: sdd-engineering
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development workflow: spec, plan, implement, verify, retro. Depends on the three plugins above.
